definition: A hall.
example: We need to understand the concept of sale.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bán hàng.

definition: An act of selling.
example: This is going to be a tough sell.
exampleVi: Đây sẽ là một cuộc bán hàng khó khăn.

definition: Something which is bought; a purchase.
example: At only $30, the second-hand kitchen table was a great buy.
exampleVi: Chỉ với 30 USD, chiếc bàn bếp cũ là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời.

definition: The acquisition of title to, or property in, anything for a price; buying for money or its equivalent.
example: They offer a free hamburger with the purchase of a drink.
exampleVi: Họ cung cấp một chiếc bánh hamburger miễn phí khi mua đồ uống.

definition: A patron, a client; one who purchases or receives a product or service from a business or merchant, or intends to do so.
example: Every person who passes by is a potential customer.
exampleVi: Mỗi người đi ngang qua đều là khách hàng tiềm năng.

definition: A customer, a buyer or receiver of goods or services.
example: We need to understand the concept of client.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khách hàng.

definition: A division, a portion, a share.
example: We gave three deals of grain in tribute to the king.
exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã dâng ba lạng thóc để cống nạp cho nhà vua.

definition: An agreement between two or more parties, to perform a specific job or work order, often temporary or of fixed duration and usually governed by a written agreement.
example: Marriage is a contract.
exampleVi: Hôn nhân là một hợp đồng.

definition: To confer with others in order to come to terms or reach an agreement.
example: We need to understand the concept of negotiate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đàm phán.

definition: The cost required to gain possession of something.
example: We need to understand the concept of price.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về giá cả.

definition: A reduction in price.
example: This store offers discounts on all its wares. That store specializes in discount wares, too.
exampleVi: Cửa hàng này cung cấp giảm giá cho tất cả các sản phẩm của mình. Cửa hàng đó cũng chuyên về đồ giảm giá.

definition: An advancement in rank or position.
example: I'll have to give myself a promotion!
exampleVi: Tôi sẽ phải tự thăng chức cho mình!

definition: A sending or mission (to do or accomplish something).
example: We need to understand the concept of commission.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hoa hồng.

definition: A proportional part or share; the share or proportion assigned to each in a division.
example: We need to understand the concept of quota.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hạn ngạch.

definition: The income returned by an investment.
example: We need to understand the concept of revenue.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm doanh thu.

definition: Money one earns by working or by capitalising on the work of others.
example: We need to understand the concept of income.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về thu nhập.

definition: Total income or cash flow minus expenditures. The money or other benefit a non-governmental organization or individual receives in exchange for products and services sold at an advertised price.
example: We need to understand the concept of profit.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lợi nhuận.

definition: To make (products or services) available for sale and promote them.
example: We plan to market an ecology model by next quarter.
exampleVi: Chúng tôi dự định tung ra thị trường một mô hình sinh thái vào quý tới.

definition: A sticky, gummy substance secreted by trees; sap.
example: It is hard to get this pitch off my hand.
exampleVi: Thật khó để có được cú ném này khỏi tay tôi.

definition: A heavy, pliable, inelastic metal element, having a bright, bluish color, but easily tarnished; both malleable and ductile, though with little tenacity. It is easily fusible, forms alloys with other metals, and is an ingredient of solder and type metal. Atomic number 82, symbol Pb (from Latin plumbum).
example: We need to understand the concept of lead.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chì.

definition: The sale of goods directly to the consumer, encompassing the storefronts, mail-order, websites, etc., and the corporate mechanisms, branding, advertising, etc. that support them.
example: She works in retail.
exampleVi: Cô ấy làm việc trong lĩnh vực bán lẻ.

definition: The sale of products, often in large quantities, to retailers or other merchants.
example: We need to understand the concept of wholesale.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bán buôn.

definition: Arrangement, disposition, or sequence.
example: We need to understand the concept of order.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trật tự.

definition: A bill; a commercial document issued by a seller to a buyer indicating the products, quantities and agreed prices for products or services that the seller has already provided the buyer with. An invoice indicates that, unless paid in advance, payment is due by the buyer to the seller, according to the agreed terms.
example: We need to understand the concept of invoice.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hóa đơn.

definition: The act of receiving, or the fact of having been received.
example: A balance payable on receipt of the goods.
exampleVi: Số dư thanh toán khi nhận hàng.

definition: The act of paying.
example: We need to understand the concept of payment.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thanh toán.

definition: The act of conducting or carrying out (business, negotiations, plans).
example: The transaction was made on Friday with the supplier.
exampleVi: Giao dịch được thực hiện vào thứ Sáu với nhà cung cấp.

definition: Someone who sells; a vendor; a clerk.
example: Alisha was a seller of fine books.
exampleVi: Alisha là một người bán sách hay.

definition: A butt or mark to shoot at, as for practice, or to test the accuracy of a firearm, or the force of a projectile.
example: Take careful aim at the target.
exampleVi: Hãy cẩn thận nhắm vào mục tiêu.

definition: Reliance on the truth of something said or done; faith; trust.
example: We need to understand the concept of credit.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tín dụng.

definition: The region which the eye overlooks at one time; view; scene; outlook.
example: We need to understand the concept of prospect.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm triển vọng.

definition: The edge of the paper, typically left blank when printing but sometimes used for annotations etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of margin.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm ký quỹ.

definition: To dig, chop, etc., with a bill.
example: We need to understand the concept of billing.

definition: An estimation of a future condition.
example: We need to understand the concept of forecast.

definition: A conduit made of pipes used to convey water, gas or petroleum etc.
example: An oil pipeline has been opened from the Caspian Sea.
exampleVi: Một đường ống dẫn dầu đã được mở từ Biển Caspian.

definition: A three-dimensional measure of space that comprises a length, a width and a height. It is measured in units of cubic centimeters in metric, cubic inches or cubic feet in English measurement.
example: The room is 9x12x8, so its volume is 864 cubic feet.
exampleVi: Căn phòng có kích thước 9x12x8 nên thể tích của nó là 864 feet khối.

definition: The notation that is used to indicate the meaning of the elements in an electronic document, or to dictate how text should be displayed.
example: We need to understand the concept of markup.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đánh dấu.

definition: To give (especially public) notice of (something); to announce publicly.
example: We need to understand the concept of advertising.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm quảng cáo.

definition: Advertising or other activity designed to rouse public interest in something.
example: We need to understand the concept of publicity.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm công khai.

definition: A piece of paper that entitles the holder to a discount, or that can be exchanged for goods and services.
example: We need to understand the concept of voucher.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm voucher.

definition: Money paid to the government other than for transaction-specific goods and services.
example: We need to understand the concept of tax.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về thuế.

definition: A system of government-imposed duties levied on imported or exported goods; a list of such duties, or the duties themselves.
example: We need to understand the concept of tariff.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thuế quan.

definition: That which one is morally or legally obligated to do.
example: We don't have a duty to keep you here.
exampleVi: Chúng tôi không có nhiệm vụ giữ bạn ở đây.

definition: Solicitation
example: We need to understand the concept of solicit.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chào mời.

definition: The process of achieving agreement through discussion.
example: We need to understand the concept of negotiation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đàm phán.

definition: (feudal law) A right to the use of a superior's land, as a stipend for services to be performed; also, the land so held; a fief.
example: We need to understand the concept of fee.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về phí.

definition: The rank, status, power or authority of a monarch.
example: We need to understand the concept of royalty.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hoàng gia.

definition: A tax charged on goods produced within the country (as opposed to customs duties, charged on goods from outside the country).
example: We need to understand the concept of excise.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thuế tiêu thụ đặc biệt.

definition: A section of a ticket, showing the holder to be entitled to some specified accommodation or service, as to a passage over a designated line of travel, a particular seat in a theater, a discount, etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of coupon.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm phiếu giảm giá.
